CameraRotationDemo:
class CameraRotationDemo(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        axes = ThreeDAxes(
            x_range=[0, 1, 0.2],
            y_range=[0, 1, 0.2],
            z_range=[-1, 1, 0.5],
            x_length=5,
            y_length=5,
            z_length=3,
        )
        self.add(axes)
        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=60*DEGREES, theta=0*DEGREES)
        surface = Surface(
            lambda u, v: axes.c2p(u, v, np.sin(2*np.pi*u)*np.sin(2*np.pi*v)),
            u_range=[0, 1],
            v_range=[0, 1],
            resolution=(30, 30),
            fill_opacity=0.7,
            checkerboard_colors=[BLUE_E, BLUE_A],
        )
        self.animate(Write(surface))
        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.2)
        self.wait(10)
WavefunctionSurfaces:
class WavefunctionSurfaces(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        data_path = "wavefunction_evolution.dat"
        N = 200
        fps = 60
        seconds_per_state = 5
        state_list = [(nx, ny) for nx in range(1, 4) for ny in range(1, 4)]
        total_frames = len(state_list) * seconds_per_state * fps
        data = np.memmap(data_path, dtype=np.float32, mode="r", shape=(total_frames, N, N, 3))
        frame_index = 100
        X = np.linspace(0, 1, N)
        Y = np.linspace(0, 1, N)
        real_vals = data[frame_index, :, :, 0]
        imag_vals = data[frame_index, :, :, 1]
        prob_vals = data[frame_index, :, :, 2]
        def make_surface(Z, axes):
            def func(u, v):
                i = int(u * (N - 1))
                j = int(v * (N - 1))
                return axes.c2p(u, v, Z[i, j])
            return Surface(
                func,
                u_range=[0, 1], v_range=[0, 1],
                resolution=(30, 30),
                fill_opacity=0.9,
                stroke_width=0,
                checkerboard_colors=[BLUE_E, BLUE_D]
            )
        spacing = 12
        axes1 = ThreeDAxes(x_range=[0, 1], y_range=[0, 1], z_range=[-1, 1]).shift(LEFT * spacing)
        surface_real = make_surface(real_vals, axes1).set_color(BLUE)
        axes2 = ThreeDAxes(x_range=[0, 1], y_range=[0, 1], z_range=[-1, 1])
        surface_imag = make_surface(imag_vals, axes2).set_color(RED)
        axes3 = ThreeDAxes(x_range=[0, 1], y_range=[0, 1], z_range=[-1, 1]).shift(RIGHT * spacing)
        surface_prob = make_surface(prob_vals, axes3).set_color(GREEN)
        label_real = MathTex(r"\Re(\psi)", font_size=32, color=BLUE).next_to(axes1, DOWN)
        label_imag = MathTex(r"\Im(\psi)", font_size=32, color=RED).next_to(axes2, DOWN)
        label_prob = MathTex(r"|\psi|^2", font_size=32, color=GREEN).next_to(axes3, DOWN)
        group = VGroup(
            axes1, surface_real, label_real,
            axes2, surface_imag, label_imag,
            axes3, surface_prob, label_prob
        )
        group.scale(0.3)
        group.move_to(ORIGIN - DOWN * 0.5)
        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=65 * DEGREES, theta=45 * DEGREES, distance=14)
        self.add(group)
        self.play(Rotate(group, angle=2 * PI, axis=OUT, run_time=8))
        self.wait()
RotateSurfacesAround:
class RotateSurfacesAround(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        def surface_func(u, v):
            return np.array([u, v, np.sin(u)*np.cos(v)])
        axes = ThreeDAxes()
        surface1 = Surface(
            surface_func,
            u_range=[-2, 2],
            v_range=[-2, 2],
            resolution=(30, 30),
            fill_opacity=0.8,
            checkerboard_colors=[BLUE_D, BLUE_E],
            stroke_width=1
        )
        surface2 = surface1.copy().shift(RIGHT * 3)
        surface3 = surface1.copy().shift(LEFT * 3)
        group = VGroup(axes, surface1, surface2, surface3)
        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=65*DEGREES, theta=45*DEGREES, distance=8)
        self.add(group)
        group.add_updater(lambda m, dt: m.rotate(0.8*dt, axis=UP))
        self.wait(6)
        group.remove_updater(lambda m, dt: None)
